_article: Prime Directive + Architecture: Simulation is source of truth, Minecraft is renderer
_comment: AUTHORED geography of Planet Suzaku. This is the source of truth for where everything IS. Minecraft's random seed does NOT decide geography — this blueprint does. The stage is fixed; the simulation (NPCs, ecology, events, opportunities) varies per playthrough via the Simulation Seed. Large-scale geography = 100% handcrafted. Medium-scale = procedural within constraints. Small-scale = fully procedural decoration. Inspired by Zelda/Elden Ring/Skyrim — Whiterun doesn't randomly spawn somewhere else. Neither does Wang Family Village.

blueprint.name: Planet Suzaku
blueprint.canon_confidence: MIXED — country names and adjacencies are EXPLICIT (Er Gen RI canon); exact coordinates are INFERRED (Article XV) based on canonical travel times and relationships
blueprint._canon_seed_comment: Fixed deterministic seed for terrain noise. Every playthrough gets the SAME terrain shape. The Simulation Seed (separate, random per world) controls NPC choices, herb locations, weather, events — NOT geography.

coordinate_system._origin_comment: Wang Family Village is the anchor point. All other locations are positioned relative to canonical travel relationships.

scale._comment: Countries span thousands of blocks. A day's travel on foot ~ 2000-3000 blocks. Wang Lin's journey from village to Heng Yue Sect takes ~1 day. Village to Teng City ~2 days. Zhao to Chu border crossing ~3-4 days.

countries.name: Zhao Country
countries.terrain_description: Temperate plains with mountain ranges to the north. Fertile farmland. The Forest of Distorted Divine Sense is embedded in the western region.
countries.cultivation_power: low — only minor sects (Heng Yue) operate here

countries.name: Chu Country
countries.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — Wang Lin flees here; larger and more powerful than Zhao
countries.terrain_description: Larger and wealthier than Zhao. Diverse terrain — forests, hills, rivers. More cultivation sects.

countries.name: Vermilion Bird Country
countries.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — the ruling dynasty of Planet Suzaku, central continent
countries.terrain_description: The seat of the Vermilion Bird Dynasty. Grand, ancient, powerful. The Imperial City is the political center of Planet Suzaku. Spirit veins are dense here.
countries.cultivation_power: supreme — the Vermilion Bird Divine Sect governs all of Planet Suzaku from here

countries.name: Snow Domain Country
countries.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — cold northern/southern region with ice-based cultivation
countries.terrain_description: Frozen wastes. Ice and snow cultivation traditions. Dangerous to mortals. Home to ice-type spirit beasts.

countries.name: Fire Burn Country
countries.terrain_description: Volcanic terrain, fire-type spirit veins. Fire-path cultivators thrive here. Dangerous but rich in fire-type resources.

countries.name: Sky Demon Country
countries.terrain_description: Dark, corrupted terrain. Demon cultivators. Dangerous for orthodox cultivators. Rich in demonic resources.

countries.name: Fire Demon Country
countries.terrain_description: Volcanic + demonic. The most hostile region. Fire demons and corrupted spirit beasts.

countries.name: Pilu Kingdom
countries.terrain_description: Western kingdom. Buddhist-influenced cultivation traditions. Calm, contemplative terrain.

countries.name: Xuan Wu Country
countries.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — black tortoise region, water/defense traditions
countries.terrain_description: Northwestern region. Water and earth cultivation. Defensive traditions. Lakes and marshes.

countries.name: Qing Shui Kingdom
countries.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — 'clear water' kingdom, ruined in canon
countries.terrain_description: Once prosperous, now partially ruined. Ancient battlefields. Spirit vein remnants. A place of opportunities and danger.
countries.cultivation_power: low — was higher before the ruin

settlements.name: Wang Family Village
settlements.description: A small mortal village in the Zhao countryside. Wang Lin was born here. The villagers are farmers, hunters, and craftsmen. None cultivate. This is where the story begins.

settlements.name: Heng Yue Sect
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — the first sect Wang Lin joins
settlements.description: A minor cultivation sect in the mountains of Zhao. Wang Lin joins here as an outer disciple. The sect has outer disciples, inner disciples, core disciples, elders, and a patriarch. Qi Condensation to Foundation Establishment tier.
settlements._distance_comment: ~1 day travel. Wang Lin walks here from the village.

settlements.name: Teng City
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — major city in Zhao, Teng Huayuan's base
settlements.description: The largest city in Zhao Country. A hub of mortal commerce. Teng Huayuan, a Foundation Establishment cultivator, operates from here. Wang Lin visits to purchase cultivation resources.

settlements.name: Tian Shui City
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — major trade hub in Zhao Country, on the central river
settlements.description: The greatest trade city in Zhao Country. Situated on the central river, Tian Shui City is where merchants, cultivators, and mortals converge. The city lord is Core Formation. Home to the merchant guild, cultivator guild, and the city guard. Known for its elegant white-stone architecture and bustling river port.

settlements.name: Zhao Capital
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — seat of the mortal government of Zhao
settlements.description: The political capital of Zhao Country. The mortal king resides here. Cultivators rarely interfere with mortal governance, but the capital is where mortal power concentrates.

settlements.name: Soul Refining Sect
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — dark sect specializing in soul refinement, one of the most dangerous locations in Zhao Country
settlements.description: A sinister, dark valley sect that specializes in refining souls. Surrounded by dead trees and perpetual mist, the Soul Refining Sect is feared by all cultivators in Zhao Country. Their techniques are forbidden — they capture spirit beasts and refine their souls for power. The central Furnace Hall contains the sect's prize artifact. The atmosphere is oppressive: black stone, soul lanterns, bone altars, and the ever-present ghost-blue glow of soul fire. This is where Wang Lin encounters one of his most dangerous adversaries.
settlements._distance_comment: ~2 days travel through dangerous terrain. Located in the dark valley region northwest of the village.

settlements.name: Forest of Distorted Divine Sense
settlements.canon_name: Shen Nian Cuo Luan Zhi Sen / 神念错乱之森
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — embedded in Zhao, distorts perception
settlements.description: A forest where divine sense becomes unreliable. Mortals feel uneasy. Cultivators below Soul Formation cannot trust their perception here. Hidden dangers and hidden opportunities.

settlements.name: Sea of Devils
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — vast eastern sea, 14+ districts, extremely dangerous
settlements.description: A vast sea to the east. 14+ districts, each with different dangers. Demon cultivators, ancient ruins, sea beasts. Wang Lin spends significant time here. Not for the weak.

settlements.name: Jue Ming Valley
settlements.canon_name: Jue Ming Gu / 绝命谷 (Valley of Certain Death)
settlements.description: The Valley of Certain Death. Those who enter rarely return. Ancient restrictions, sealed beasts, hidden inheritance. Wang Lin barely survives it.

settlements.name: Nan Dou City
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — capital of the Nan Dou region on Planet Suzaku
settlements.description: The capital of the Nan Dou region. A massive ancient city housing the regional cultivation authority, major merchant guilds, the Temple of the Heavenly Dao, and hundreds of thousands of mortals and cultivators. The city lord is a late Nascent Soul cultivator. A political nexus where sects negotiate, merchants trade spirit stones, and mortals live in the shadow of immortals.

settlements.name: Suzaku Tomb
settlements.canon_confidence: EXPLICIT — underground, contains the Cultivation Planet Crystal
settlements.description: The tomb of the Vermilion Bird. Deep underground. Contains the Cultivation Planet Crystal that seals Planet Suzaku. The most important location on the planet — but its entrance is hidden and sealed.

mountain_ranges.name: Northern Zhao Mountains
mountain_ranges._comment: The mountain range where Heng Yue Sect is situated.

rivers.name: Zhao Central River
rivers._comment: Flows south through Zhao, past the capital.

spirit_veins.name: Heng Yue Spirit Vein
spirit_veins._comment: The spirit vein beneath Heng Yue Sect. Minor quality. Sustains the sect's cultivation.

spirit_veins.name: Wang Village Hinterland Vein
spirit_veins._comment: A trace spirit vein near Wang Family Village. Too weak to sustain a sect, but mortals sometimes feel 'lucky' near it.

spirit_veins.name: Imperial Spirit Vein
spirit_veins._comment: The major spirit vein beneath the Imperial City. Densest spirit energy on Planet Suzaku.

spirit_veins.name: Sea of Devils Abyssal Vein
spirit_veins._comment: A corrupted major spirit vein beneath the Sea of Devils. Attracts demon cultivators.

roads.name: Village to Heng Yue Road
roads._comment: The road Wang Lin walks to reach Heng Yue Sect.

roads.name: Zhao to Chu Trade Road
roads._comment: The main trade route between Zhao and Chu.

ecology_zones.name: Zhao Plains Ecology
ecology_zones._comment: Temperate ecology. Wolves hunt deer and rabbits. Boars root in the forests.

ecology_zones.name: Sea of Devils Ecology
ecology_zones._comment: Corrupted ocean ecology. Demon-type beasts. Extremely dangerous.

simulation_seed_config._comment: The Simulation Seed is SEPARATE from the Canon Seed. It is random per world. It controls things that SHOULD vary per playthrough: exact herb placement, NPC personality rolls, weather patterns, event timing, beast migration paths, rumor generation, random inheritance discoveries. Geography is NEVER affected by the simulation seed.
